requirement_topic.en: JIRAMA Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 220/380 V 50 Hz Settings — with ORE Licensing Gate
requirement_topic.zh: JIRAMA并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及220/380 V 50 Hz参数——附ORE许可门槛
requirement_topic.zht: JIRAMA併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及220/380 V 50 Hz參數——附ORE許可門檻

summary.en: Madagascar's national grid, operated by JIRAMA (Jiro sy Rano Malagasy), operates at 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz — the modern national standard. Note: some older infrastructure and isolated networks in Madagascar historically operated at 127 V; the current national standard for new connections is 220/380 V at 50 Hz but local voltage conditions should be confirmed on a project-by-project basis. Grid-tied PV inverters connecting to JIRAMA's network must comply with JIRAMA's technical conditions for grid interconnection. IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) and IEC 62116 (Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures) are the applicable IEC standards for grid-tied PV inverter interface requirements and anti-islanding, consistent with BNM's IEC-based standards adoption. ORE (Office de Régulation de l'Electricité) licenses electricity generation projects; any grid-tied solar project above the applicable capacity threshold requires an ORE licence before JIRAMA interconnection. The ORE licensing process includes technical review of the generation equipment and connection arrangements. Utility-scale solar projects in Madagascar (such as IPP projects including the GreenYellow Ambatolampy plant) are subject to ORE concession and JIRAMA power purchase agreement requirements in addition to technical standards compliance.
summary.zh: 马达加斯加国家电网由JIRAMA（马达加斯加国家水电公司）运营，现代国家标准为220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz。注：马达加斯加部分旧基础设施及孤立电网历史上曾采用127 V；现行新接入国家标准为220/380 V 50 Hz，但本地电压条件应逐项目确认。接入JIRAMA电网的并网光伏逆变器须符合JIRAMA并网技术条件。IEC 61727（光伏系统——与电力系统的接口特性）和IEC 62116（并网光伏逆变器——防孤岛措施测试程序）是并网光伏逆变器接口要求和防孤岛的适用IEC标准，与BNM基于IEC的标准采纳一致。ORE（电力监管办公室）负责发电项目许可；任何超过适用容量阈值的并网太阳能项目在JIRAMA互联前须取得ORE许可。ORE许可流程包括对发电设备和接入安排的技术审查。马达加斯加的大型太阳能项目（如包括GreenYellow Ambatolampy电站在内的独立发电商项目）须在符合技术标准的基础上额外满足ORE特许经营及JIRAMA购电协议要求。
summary.zht: 馬達加斯加國家電網由JIRAMA（馬達加斯加國家水電公司）運營，現代國家標準為220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz。注：馬達加斯加部分舊基礎設施及孤立電網歷史上曾採用127 V；現行新接入國家標準為220/380 V 50 Hz，但本地電壓條件應逐項目確認。接入JIRAMA電網的併網光伏逆變器須符合JIRAMA併網技術條件。IEC 61727（光伏系統——與電力系統的接口特性）和IEC 62116（併網光伏逆變器——防孤島措施測試程序）是併網光伏逆變器接口要求和防孤島的適用IEC標準，與BNM基於IEC的標準採納一致。ORE（電力監管辦公室）負責發電項目許可；任何超過適用容量閾值的併網太陽能項目在JIRAMA互聯前須取得ORE許可。ORE許可流程包括對發電設備和接入安排的技術審查。馬達加斯加的大型太陽能項目（如包括GreenYellow Ambatolampy電站在內的獨立發電商項目）須在符合技術標準的基礎上額外滿足ORE特許經營及JIRAMA購電協議要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (IEC standard adopted under BNM framework)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (IEC standard adopted under BNM framework)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (applicable to PV inverters with input current ≤16 A per phase)
ORE (Office de Régulation de l'Electricité) — electricity generation licensing and technical review
JIRAMA (Jiro sy Rano Malagasy) — national utility grid-connection technical conditions

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence for PV inverters commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV), NB/T 32004-2018 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results. Madagascar's national grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) is nominally the same as China's grid under GB/T 156, which means that firmware protection settings validated for Chinese grid conditions may not require voltage re-parameterisation for Madagascar JIRAMA grid connection — unlike export to countries with different nominal voltages (e.g. Qatar at 240/415 V). However, Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates are not accepted as IEC-referenced compliance evidence by ORE, JIRAMA, or donor/lender procurement specifications in Madagascar. IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence from an ILAC-accredited lab is still required.
summary.zh: 光伏逆变器的中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆变器技术规范）及国内防孤岛测试结果。马达加斯加国家电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）名义上与中国依据GB/T 156的电网参数相同，这意味着针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护设置在接入JIRAMA电网时可能无需重新参数化——与出口至电压不同国家（如卡塔尔240/415 V）相比差异较小。然而，中国GB/T并网证书不被ORE、JIRAMA或马达加斯加捐赠方/贷款方采购规格接受为IEC合规证据。仍须提供来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛证据。
summary.zht: 光伏逆變器的中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆變器技術規範）及國內防孤島測試結果。馬達加斯加國家電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）名義上與中國依據GB/T 156的電網參數相同，這意味著針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護設置在接入JIRAMA電網時可能無需重新參數化——與出口至電壓不同國家（如卡達240/415 V）相比差異較小。然而，中國GB/T併網證書不被ORE、JIRAMA或馬達加斯加捐贈方/貸款方採購規格接受為IEC合規證據。仍須提供來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages — China: 220/380 V, 50 Hz)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy JIRAMA/ORE IEC-referenced requirements. Exporters should prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance evidence; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence where applicable. Voltage re-parameterisation risk is lower than for many other export markets because Madagascar's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China's GB/T 156 standard — but confirm actual local voltage conditions with JIRAMA or the project engineer, as some isolated networks may differ. For utility-scale projects, confirm ORE licensing requirements, capacity thresholds, and the applicable JIRAMA power purchase or grid-use agreement before finalising equipment specification.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足JIRAMA/ORE的IEC参考要求。出口商应准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727电力系统接口合规证据；（c）适用时的IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据。由于马达加斯加名义电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国GB/T 156标准一致，电压重新参数化风险低于许多其他出口市场——但应与JIRAMA或项目工程师确认实际本地电压条件，因部分孤立电网可能存在差异。对于大型项目，在最终确定设备规格前，应确认ORE许可要求、容量阈值及适用的JIRAMA购电或电网使用协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足JIRAMA/ORE的IEC參考要求。出口商應準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727電力系統接口合規證據；（c）適用時的IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據。由於馬達加斯加名義電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國GB/T 156標準一致，電壓重新參數化風險低於許多其他出口市場——但應與JIRAMA或項目工程師確認實際本地電壓條件，因部分孤立電網可能存在差異。對於大型項目，在最終確定設備規格前，應確認ORE許可要求、容量閾值及適用的JIRAMA購電或電網使用協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-tied installations connecting to JIRAMA's network (ORE licence required above applicable capacity threshold; JIRAMA technical review is a non-negotiable interconnection gate); IEC anti-islanding and interface compliance are standard documentary requirements for donor/lender-financed projects
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to JIRAMA Madagascar grid-connection acceptance or ORE licensing

source.publisher: ORE (Office de Régulation de l'Electricité), Madagascar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates are not accepted as IEC-referenced compliance evidence for JIRAMA interconnection or ORE licensing in Madagascar. Obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Madagascar's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China's, reducing firmware re-parameterisation risk — but verify actual JIRAMA local network conditions before finalising inverter settings. Confirm ORE licensing thresholds and JIRAMA technical review requirements directly with ORE and JIRAMA before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网证书不被马达加斯加JIRAMA互联或ORE许可接受为IEC合规证据。须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727电力系统接口测试证据。马达加斯加名义电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国一致，降低了固件重新参数化风险——但在最终确定逆变器设置前，应核实JIRAMA本地实际电网条件。在项目提交前，请直接向ORE和JIRAMA确认ORE许可阈值及JIRAMA技术审查要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網證書不被馬達加斯加JIRAMA互聯或ORE許可接受為IEC合規證據。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727電力系統接口測試證據。馬達加斯加名義電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國一致，降低了韌體重新參數化風險——但在最終確定逆變器設置前，應核實JIRAMA本地實際電網條件。在項目提交前，請直接向ORE和JIRAMA確認ORE許可閾值及JIRAMA技術審查要求。

requirement_topic.en: ADER Off-Grid and Mini-Grid Solar — Rural Electrification Programme Requirements and Donor/Lender Quality Standards
requirement_topic.zh: ADER离网及微电网太阳能——农村电气化计划要求及捐赠方/贷款方质量标准
requirement_topic.zht: ADER離網及微電網太陽能——農村電氣化計畫要求及捐贈方/貸款方質量標準

summary.en: A large proportion of solar PV inverter deployments in Madagascar are for off-grid or mini-grid applications serving rural communities with no JIRAMA grid access, given the country's very low electrification rate (approximately 35% nationally). The Agence de Développement de l'Electrification Rurale (ADER) is the principal government agency for rural electrification and manages or oversees programmes funded by international donors and lenders including the World Bank, Agence Française de Développement (AFD), the European Union, and bilateral donors. These programmes commonly specify IEC-based quality standards for inverters and PV system components. For smaller plug-and-play solar systems and solar home systems (SHS), donor and lender procurement may reference VeraSol (formerly Lighting Global) quality standards or IEC TS 62257-series standards for rural electrification. For mini-grid and community-scale solar-diesel hybrid systems, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence and IEC 62116 anti-islanding (where relevant to the system design) are commonly required by donor procurement specifications. Chinese GB/T certificates alone do not satisfy these international donor/lender quality requirements.
summary.zh: 鉴于马达加斯加全国电气化率极低（约35%），大量太阳能光伏逆变器部署用于为无法接入JIRAMA电网的农村社区提供服务的离网或微电网应用。农村电气化发展署（ADER）是农村电气化的主要政府机构，管理或监督由国际捐赠方和贷款方（包括世界银行、法国开发署（AFD）、欧盟及双边捐赠方）资助的计划。这些计划通常对逆变器和光伏系统部件规定基于IEC的质量标准。对于较小的即插即用太阳能系统和太阳能家庭系统（SHS），捐赠方和贷款方采购可能参考VeraSol（原Lighting Global）质量标准或农村电气化IEC TS 62257系列标准。对于微电网和社区规模太阳能-柴油混合系统，捐赠方采购规格通常要求IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据及（在与系统设计相关时）IEC 62116防孤岛证据。仅凭中国GB/T证书不满足上述国际捐赠方/贷款方质量要求。
summary.zht: 鑒於馬達加斯加全國電氣化率極低（約35%），大量太陽能光伏逆變器部署用於為無法接入JIRAMA電網的農村社區提供服務的離網或微電網應用。農村電氣化發展署（ADER）是農村電氣化的主要政府機構，管理或監督由國際捐贈方和貸款方（包括世界銀行、法國開發署（AFD）、歐盟及雙邊捐贈方）資助的計畫。這些計畫通常對逆變器和光伏系統部件規定基於IEC的質量標準。對於較小的即插即用太陽能系統和太陽能家庭系統（SHS），捐贈方和貸款方採購可能參考VeraSol（原Lighting Global）質量標準或農村電氣化IEC TS 62257系列標準。對於微電網和社區規模太陽能-柴油混合系統，捐贈方採購規格通常要求IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據及（在與系統設計相關時）IEC 62116防孤島證據。僅憑中國GB/T證書不滿足上述國際捐贈方/貸款方質量要求。

standards_or_laws: ADER (Agence de Développement de l'Electrification Rurale) — rural electrification programme requirements and technical specifications
IEC TS 62257 series — Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification
VeraSol / Lighting Global Quality Standards — applicable to solar home systems and small plug-and-play solar products procured by donor programmes
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (commonly required by donor/lender procurement for mini-grid inverters)
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — anti-islanding test procedure (applicable where mini-grid systems have grid-forming or interconnection features)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to ADER or the donor-financed rural electrification programme structure in Madagascar. Chinese off-grid PV inverter quality is assessed under domestic standards frameworks not recognised by international donor procurement specifications. Chinese manufacturers seeking to supply to ADER or donor-financed programmes in Madagascar must demonstrate compliance with the applicable IEC or VeraSol/Lighting Global quality standards required by the specific programme or lender procurement rules — Chinese GB/T certificates alone do not satisfy these requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有与ADER或马达加斯加捐赠方资助农村电气化计划架构直接对应的等效机制。中国离网光伏逆变器质量依据国内标准框架评估，该框架不被国际捐赠方采购规格认可。希望向马达加斯加ADER或捐赠方资助计划供货的中国制造商须证明符合特定计划或贷款方采购规则要求的IEC或VeraSol/Lighting Global质量标准——仅凭中国GB/T证书不满足上述要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與ADER或馬達加斯加捐贈方資助農村電氣化計畫架構直接對應的等效機制。中國離網光伏逆變器質量依據國內標準框架評估，該框架不被國際捐贈方採購規格認可。希望向馬達加斯加ADER或捐贈方資助計畫供貨的中國製造商須證明符合特定計畫或貸款方採購規則要求的IEC或VeraSol/Lighting Global質量標準——僅憑中國GB/T證書不滿足上述要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters supplied to ADER rural electrification programmes or donor/lender-financed off-grid and mini-grid projects in Madagascar must meet the specific quality standards required by the applicable programme or procurement document — typically IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116 (where relevant), and for smaller solar products, VeraSol/Lighting Global quality standards. Chinese GB/T certificates do not transfer to these programme requirements. Confirm the exact quality standard, testing laboratory accreditation, and certification body requirements directly with ADER, the project owner, or the donor/lender procurement team before committing product to a specific programme.
gap.zh: 差距：供应至ADER农村电气化计划或马达加斯加捐赠方/贷款方资助离网及微电网项目的中国逆变器须满足适用计划或采购文件规定的具体质量标准——通常为IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116（相关时），以及对于较小太阳能产品的VeraSol/Lighting Global质量标准。中国GB/T证书不能转移至上述计划要求。在将产品用于特定计划前，请直接向ADER、项目业主或捐赠方/贷款方采购团队确认具体质量标准、测试实验室认可资质及认证机构要求。
gap.zht: 差距：供應至ADER農村電氣化計畫或馬達加斯加捐贈方/貸款方資助離網及微電網項目的中國逆變器須滿足適用計畫或採購文件規定的具體質量標準——通常為IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116（相關時），以及對於較小太陽能產品的VeraSol/Lighting Global質量標準。中國GB/T證書不能轉移至上述計畫要求。在將產品用於特定計畫前，請直接向ADER、項目業主或捐贈方/貸款方採購團隊確認具體質量標準、測試實驗室認可資質及認證機構要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for donor/lender-financed rural electrification and off-grid programmes managed or overseen by ADER; specific quality standard requirements (IEC, VeraSol) depend on the programme and procurement document — confirm per project
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic rural electrification approvals and GB/T certifications are not transferable to Madagascar ADER programme or donor/lender procurement requirements

source.publisher: ADER (Agence de Développement de l'Electrification Rurale), Madagascar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ADER rural electrification programmes and donor/lender-financed off-grid and mini-grid projects in Madagascar require IEC-based quality evidence — Chinese GB/T certifications alone do not satisfy these requirements. For mini-grid inverters, obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 and IEC 62116 (where applicable) type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. For smaller solar home systems and plug-and-play products, confirm whether VeraSol/Lighting Global quality standards apply. Verify programme-specific requirements directly with ADER or the donor/lender procurement team before committing product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马达加斯加ADER农村电气化计划及捐赠方/贷款方资助的离网及微电网项目要求基于IEC的质量证据——仅凭中国GB/T认证不满足上述要求。对于微电网逆变器，须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1/-2及（适用时）IEC 62116型式试验证据。对于较小的太阳能家庭系统及即插即用产品，应确认VeraSol/Lighting Global质量标准是否适用。在确定供货产品前，请直接向ADER或捐赠方/贷款方采购团队核实计划具体要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬達加斯加ADER農村電氣化計畫及捐贈方/貸款方資助的離網及微電網項目要求基於IEC的質量證據——僅憑中國GB/T認證不滿足上述要求。對於微電網逆變器，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/-2及（適用時）IEC 62116型式試驗證據。對於較小的太陽能家庭系統及即插即用產品，應確認VeraSol/Lighting Global質量標準是否適用。在確定供貨產品前，請直接向ADER或捐贈方/貸款方採購團隊核實計畫具體要求。
